mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_share (share_code, template_id, share_type, expire_at, password, allow_edit, created_by, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, revoked) VALUES (#{shareCode}, #{templateId}, #{shareType}, #{expireAt}, #{password}, #{allowEdit}, #{createdBy}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{revoked})
mapper.select: SELECT id, share_code, template_id, share_type, expire_at, password, allow_edit, created_by, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, revoked FROM form_share WHERE share_code = #{shareCode}

SELECT id, share_code, template_id, share_type, expire_at, password, allow_edit, created_by, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, revoked FROM form_share WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND revoked = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE form_share SET revoked = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE share_code = #{shareCode}
